global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with abstract shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting new seasonal offerings with a strong call to action.

elements.label: blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping abstract shapes, one oval and one rectangle, are centered on the blue background.

elements.label: main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top reads 'FluxStream', indicating the brand or service.

elements.label: season announcement
elements.description: Large white text in the center states 'A new season drops', conveying the main message.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom with the text 'Order now', encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: additional shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangle shape is positioned within the main subject area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: small shape
elements.description: A small, abstract shape located in the center, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: additional shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape, similar to the main subject, adds complexity to the design.

elements.label: small shape
elements.description: A small shape positioned centrally, enhancing the visual layout.

elements.label: additional shape
elements.description: A rectangle shape that complements the main subject, adding depth.

elements.label: small shape
elements.description: A tiny shape located in the center, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: season announcement
elements.description: Text at the bottom reads 'new season drops Order now', reinforcing the call to action.

elements.label: brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, representing the brand identity.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the top left corner indicating 'UGC', suggesting user-generated content.
